name: ahau-canon
description: Sealed, load-bearing Popol Wuj canon corpus (descent + Wuqub Kak'ix) with a two-witness CI integrity gate. Each arc is independently self-sealing; none may be rewritten — only entered, applied, and deliberately re-sealed after lineage review.

scripts.verify:gate: npm run verify:canon && npm run verify:publication
scripts.verify:all: npm run preflight ; npm run canary && npm run verify:canon && npm run verify:publication && npm run typecheck
